title: Proclamation No. 1385, s. 2007
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1385

RESERVING A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN FOR SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES OF CAMBABANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SITUATED IN BARANGAY CAMBABANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources, and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, do hereby reserve a certain parcel of land of the public domain for school site purposes of Cambabangan Elementary School situated in Barangay Cambabangan, Municipality of Rizal, Province of Cagayan, subject to private rights, if any there be, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows:

LOT NO. 906, PLS-612-D

A PARCEL OF LAND identified as Lot No. 906, Pls-612-D, as surveyed for Cambabangan Elementary School, situated at Barangay Cambabangan, Municipality of Rizal, Province of Cagayan, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the S.W., along line 1-2 by Lot 908, Pls-612-D; on the N.W., along line 2-3 by road; on the N.E., along line 3-4 by Lot 782; on the S.E., along line 4-1 by Lot 907, all of Pls-612-D. Beginning at a point marked “1” on the plan, being S. 87 deg. 47’E., 2718.23 meters from B.L.L.M. No. 1, Pls-612-D, thence:

108.30 m. to point 2;

104.03 m. to point 3;

102.83 m. to point 4;

99.23 m. to point of

beginning. Containing an area of TEN THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED NINETEEN (10,719) SQUARE METERS , more or less. All corners are marked on the ground by P.S. cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 40 cms. Bearing True. The survey was executed by Geodetic Engineer S. Perez on August 11, 1958 and was approved on March 31, 1960.

The tract of land herein reserved shall be non-alienable until again declared alienable through Proclamation by the President.

The area covered by this proclamation shall be under the administrative jurisdiction, supervision, and control of the Department of Education.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila this 11th day of September in the year of our Lord, Two Thousand and Seven.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
